title: Astrological (End Terrain & Biomes)
description: Overhauling the end with new terrain generation and blocks.
body:
Astrological is a mod which overhauls the End with new terrain generation, blocks, lighting, and more.

Key Features:
- Two new layers of end islands below the existing terrain of the end.
- Overhauls of each end biome with unique features. 
- Anti-eclipse event where anyone withing line of sight of Ender is telekinetically pulled upwards as the ambient lighting increases.
- You now enter the end in the outer islands and make your way to the center island to defeat the dragon and leave. 
- Custom end themed lighting in the end. 
- 50+ new blocks. 

Credit to Jacqueline Vile for making most of the textures used in this mod. 

This mod may be used in any modpack.

Discord: https://discord.gg/HHqKa8vTAN
